data.description: Poll: BoE is to reduce bond holdings by £67.5 bln during October 2025-September 2026.

data.title: DOGE price climbs 4%, hits $0.26 as US DOGE ETF launch faces delay reported by Bloomberg's Eric Balchunas.
data.description: The value of Dogecoin increased by approximately 4% to reach $0.26, even as Bloomberg's Eric Balchunas announced a further postponement for the first US Dogecoin exchange-traded fund (ETF).

data.title: FOX News presents "Charlie Kirk: An American Original" hosted by Jesse Watters on Sept 13 at 7 PM/ET.
data.description: On Saturday, September 13th at 7 PM/ET, FOX News Channel is set to air a special program titled "Charlie Kirk: An American Original" hosted by Jesse Watters. The one-hour primetime special will showcase the life and achievements of Charlie Kirk. This tribute marks a significant event, with viewers tuning in to watch the special and celebrate an American original.

data.title: Illumination and Nintendo announce new Super Mario animated film titled The Super Mario Galaxy Movie; to be released worldwide on April 3, 2026.
data.description: Illumination and Nintendo have revealed that their upcoming animated film based on Super Mario Bros. will be titled The Super Mario Galaxy Movie. The movie is set to be released globally by Universal Pictures on April 3, 2026. Illumination, headquartered in Santa Monica, CA, USA, and founded by CEO Chris Meledandri, will be partnering with Nintendo, based in Kyoto, Japan, with Shuntaro Furukawa as the President. The collaboration aims to bring the beloved video game characters to the big screen in what is anticipated to be a highly-anticipated cinematic event.

data.title: Approximately 50% of PancakeSwap's 'random' prize winners seem connected as revealed by blockchain analysis, contrary to claims.
data.description: PancakeSwap recently announced the winners of its trading competition, stating that they were chosen randomly. However, an analysis of blockchain records reveals that more than 50% of the winners have connections to a group of interlinked wallets. This discrepancy raises concerns about the fairness and transparency of the competition.

data.title: The upcoming generation, Gen Alpha, will favor Bitcoin over gold as their default store of value.
data.description: The rise of Gen Alpha marks a generation that will embrace Bitcoin as a core aspect of their culture and financial practices. For them, Bitcoin will serve as the primary store of value, overshadowing traditional investments in gold. This shift signifies a significant change in the investment landscape as younger individuals prioritize digital assets like Bitcoin over traditional assets like gold. The growing acceptance and adoption of Bitcoin among Gen Alpha indicate a future where digital currencies play a vital role in global finance and wealth management.

data.title: Alkermes appoints Joshua Reed as CFO, effective Sept. 15, 2025. Reed will report to CEO Richard Pops.
data.description: Dublin, Sep 12, 2025 - Alkermes plc (Nasdaq: ALKS) has appointed Joshua Reed as its new Chief Financial Officer (CFO), starting from Monday, Sep 15, 2025. Reporting directly to Alkermes' Chief Executive Officer, Richard Pops, Reed brings his financial expertise to the company.

data.title: GNC unveils new pre-workout LIT V2 in Beyond Raw lineup, promising enhanced performance.
data.description: GNC, a leading global health and wellness brand, has unveiled LIT V2 - a revamped pre-workout supplement designed to elevate performance. This latest offering from their Beyond Raw line promises unparalleled results for fitness enthusiasts. The advanced formula is set to redefine workout experiences, catering to the needs of consumers seeking enhanced efficacy. The launch took place on September 12, 2025, marking a significant milestone for GNC in delivering cutting-edge fitness solutions.

data.title: Abcourt Mines Inc. celebrates first gold pour at Sleeping Giant Mine, marking a milestone in operations.
data.description: Abcourt Mines Inc., a Quebec-based corporation listed on TSX Venture (ABI) and OTCQB (ABMBF), has achieved a major milestone by successfully conducting its inaugural gold pour at the Sleeping Giant Mine in Rouyn-Noranda. This achievement underscores the company's dedication to sustainable gold production. This news was released on September 12, 2025.

data.title: Linkind introduces AI-driven feature in AiDot app for personalized light show creation, providing limitless customization.
data.description: A new AI-powered feature has been introduced in the AiDot app by Linkind in Los Angeles on September 12, 2025. This feature allows users to enjoy personalized creativity and extensive customization in their lighting experience. The two-tiered system ensures limitless possibilities, with AI technology driving the innovation. Users can now enhance their lighting setups in unique ways, redefining their experience with this cutting-edge technology.

data.title: Despite delay of US spot DOGE ETF launch, Dogecoin rose by 4% to $0.26. US spot DOGE ETF launch postponed again.
data.description: Despite news of a delay for the first US spot DOGE ETF, Dogecoin saw a 4% increase, reaching a value of $0.26. Bloomberg's Eric Balchunas made the report on the delay.
Canadian Delegation Held Positive Talks with China on Canola Dispute, Opening Path for Future Trade Discussions

data.title: KnitWell Group's 8 iconic American retail brands unite for Breast Cancer Research Foundation with Sisterhood of Strength.
data.description: KnitWell Group, a prominent multi-brand retail company comprising of Ann Taylor, Chico's, Haven Well Within, Lane Bryant, LOFT, SOMA, Talbots, and White House Black Market, has disclosed the revival of its campaign for Breast Cancer Awareness Month. The announcement was made in New York on September 12, 2025.

data.title: TRESemmé sponsors NY Fashion Week for 19th year, showcasing party-proof styles. HOBOKEN, N.J., Sept. 12, 2025.
data.description: This season in Hoboken, New Jersey, on September 12, 2025, TRESemmé is elevating bedheads into stunning party-ready styles that are designed to endure more than just the runway. The brand is set to showcase its expertise backstage, ensuring that everyone can rock a bombshell look that continues to turn heads even after the event.
Legislator Kelly Morrison reports recent stock transactions involving companies like JNJ, ACN, TMO, and VZ.

data.title: AtlasClear Holdings' subsidiary, Wilson-Davis & Co., Inc., reports 295% increase in net income with new introducing broker-dealer.
data.description: TAMPA, Florida - AtlasClear Holdings, Inc. (NYSE American: ATCH) shared that its subsidiary, Wilson-Davis & Co, Inc. (“WDCO”), submitted audited financial reports promptly to regulatory authorities. The latest financial data highlighted notable enhancements in revenue, net income, and net capital. Additionally, Wilson-Davis revealed a partnership with a new introducing broker-dealer, Dawson James Securities, through a recently signed agreement to act as a correspondent clearing client. Wilson-Davis disclosed financials reflecting Year End 06/3, showcasing positive progress in key areas.

data.title: Imperial Petroleum Inc. (Nasdaq: IMPP) declares a div of $0.546875/share on its 8.75% Series A Preferred Shares, payable on Sept. 30, 2025.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, in Athens, Greece, Imperial Petroleum Inc. (Nasdaq: IMPP), a company specializing in seaborne transportation services for petroleum products, crude oil, and dry bulk, revealed a dividend declaration. The dividend amounts to $0.546875 per share for its 8.75% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock (known as the "Series A Preferred Shares"). This dividend is slated for payment on September 30, 2025, for shareholders listed as of September 25, 2025. It covers the period from the last dividend payout date on June 30, 2025, until September 29, 2025.
